ddls:
CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "time_period" INTEGER /* The time period for the admission data */,
  "time_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the time period (e.g., Calendar year, Academic year) */,
  "geographic_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic level of the data */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "admission_numbers" INTEGER /* Number of admissions */,
  "admission_type_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the type of admission */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the institution where the admission occurred */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the program for which the admission is recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the source of the admission */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the method of admission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES admission_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES admission_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_geographic_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("geographic_level_id") REFERENCES geographic_levels ("geographic_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_levels" (
  "geographic_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic level */,
  "geographic_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic level (e.g., National, Regional, Local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the geographic level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geographic_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country the region belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_areas" (
  "local_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local area */,
  "local_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the local area */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the local area belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the local area */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the local area in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_local_areas_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution type */,
  "local_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local area where the institution is located */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students currently enrolled */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_institution_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_type_id") REFERENCES institution_types ("institution_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_local_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_area_id") REFERENCES local_areas ("local_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_types" (
  "institution_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution type */,
  "institution_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution type (e.g., University, College, School) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the institution type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program type */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_type_id") REFERENCES program_types ("program_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_types" (
  "program_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program type */,
  "program_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the program type (e.g., Undergraduate, Graduate, Certificate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the program type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_details" (
  "admission_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission detail */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "admission_status" TEXT /* Status of the admission (e.g., accepted, rejected, pending) */,
  "admission_type_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the type of admission */,
  "admission_source_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the source of the admission */,
  "admission_method_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the method of admission */,
  "admission_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the admission */,
  "scholarship_amount" REAL /* Amount of any scholarship awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_details_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_details_admission_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_source_id") REFERENCES admission_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_details_admission_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_method_id") REFERENCES admission_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_details_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_details_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Status of any disabilities (e.g., none, visual impairment, hearing impairment) */,
  "previous_institution" TEXT /* Name of the previous educational institution attended */,
  "previous_degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained from the previous institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission source (e.g., Online, In-person, Transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the admission source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission method (e.g., Application, Scholarship, Direct Entry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the admission method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_source_methods" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link record */,
  "admission_detail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission detail */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission source */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission method */,
  "admission_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the admission through this source and method */,
  "scholarship_amount" REAL /* Amount of any scholarship awarded through this source and method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_source_methods_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES admission_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_source_methods_admission_detail_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_detail_id") REFERENCES admission_details ("admission_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_source_methods_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES admission_methods ("method_id")
)
